---
title: "Resume"
---

# Professional Resume

📄 Download Full Resume

[Download Resume](PramodKumar_Resume-11Feb26.docx)

---

# Professional Summary

Senior Voice Infrastructure Specialist with more than 15 years of experience working with global enterprises in the banking, consulting, and technology sectors.

Expertise in designing, implementing, and managing enterprise voice infrastructure using Cisco Unified Communications, Avaya PBX systems, NICE and Verint recording platforms, and modern collaboration technologies.

---

# Key Technical Skills

### Voice Infrastructure

Cisco Unified Call Manager  
Cisco IM & Presence  
Cisco Expressway  
Cisco Meeting Server  
Cisco Jabber  
Cisco Deskphones and Video Devices  

### Recording Technologies

NICE Recording  
Verint Recording  
Voice Biometrics  
Speech Analytics  

### Collaboration Platforms

Microsoft Teams PSTN Calling  
Zoom Cloud Phone  

### Programming & Databases

Python  
ICM Scripting  
MSSQL  
MySQL  

### Protocols

SIP  
H323  
SCCP  
MGCP  
TLS / SSL  

### ITSM & Incident Management

ServiceNow  
ITSM Tools  
iChamps
